title: Draft post to announce the FTC Guide
body:
* [X] I have read the Content Guidelines.
* [X] I have read the Technical Guidelines.
* [X] I used or followed the R Markdown or Markdown template.
* [X] I have followed the Style Guide.
* [X] I created or updated my author metadata with correct folder name.
* [X] I have added relevant tags after browsing existing tags (including "community" tag).
* [X] I have added the "tech notes" tag if this is a technote.
* [X] I ran `roblog::ro_lint_md()` on index.md (optional).
* [X] I ran `roblog::ro_check_urls()` on index.md (optional).
* [X] I ran a spell-check on index.md.

labels.name: blog post
labels.description: Blog posts to be published when merged

title: Add blog post for reviser
body:
## Summary

This PR adds a blog post about the `reviser` package.

Included:
- post source and rendered Markdown
- SVG figures generated from the post
- author page for Marc Burri
- author image

## Files

- `content/blog/2026-04-13-reviser/index.Rmd`
- `content/blog/2026-04-13-reviser/index.md`
- `content/blog/2026-04-13-reviser/gdp-example-plot-1.svg`
- `content/blog/2026-04-13-reviser/kk-nowcast-example-1.svg`
- `content/author/marc-burri/_index.md`
- `themes/ropensci/static/img/community/marc-burri.jpg`

## Notes

This PR follows the technical blog guidelines for an `index.Rmd` post with knitted Markdown and bundled figure assets.

Checklist for posts on peer-reviewed packages

- [x] The post is in a folder under `content/blog/`.
- [x] The post exists as both `index.Rmd` and knitted `index.md`.
- [x] Figure files used by the post are included in the same bundle.
- [x] The post includes informative alt text for generated figures.
- [x] The post has an author file under `content/author/`.
- [x] The post has been previewed locally with Hugo.
- [x] The post acknowledges the package reviewers.
- [x] The post links to the software review issue/thread.
- [x] Final publication date has been confirmed with the editor.

labels.name: blog post

title: Add detail about moving figures to precompile vignettes post
body: Closes #1263.  I replaced the github links to `eia` vignettes and precompile.R with permalinks from the point in time @maelle  mentioned [here](https://github.com/ropensci/roweb3/issues/1263#issuecomment-4045049490).  I added a short sentence and permalink to `jstor`'s `precompile.R` script which has code to move the generated figures to the correct place.  I didn't link the the one from my package because I got the idea from searching GitHub for path:"vignettes/precompile.R" and this is one of the ropensci packages that did this.

title: Improve gallery
body:
- I made each div in the gallery (each figure) aria-hidden.
- Along each aria-hidden div I added an sr-only (screenreader only in the Bootstrap version we use) paragraph that says "a picture:" and then the alternative text, plus the caption between parentheses if there is one.
